Title: Osney Bridge diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed ~150 yards before bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road parallel to river, returning via Botley Road.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge Henley closure
Description: Footbridge closed for safety. Official 2.7-mile diversion via A4155 twice. Order extends beyond 31 Jan 2026, likely to 2027.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed. Diversion via NCN 5 cycle route.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway closure
Description: Walkway closed at high river flows due to corrosion. Diversion via Abingdon town centre. Reopens during low flows.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure
Description: Footbridge closed since May 2023 due to structural decay. Centre span removed Nov 2025. Diversion via Marlow Bridge or Medmenham. Reopening unlikely until 2028.

Title: Bridge 142 Egham closure
Description: Cast iron bridge damaged by tree strike. Closed Feb 2024. Diversion via A308 and Causeway. May extend to 2027.

Title: Bell Weir Lock Thames Path diversion
Description: Small diversion around construction compound at Runnymede Pleasure Grounds for Bell Weir lock refurbishment works. Work planned spring 2026 to autumn 2027.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Half-mile diversion away from Thames due to eroding towpath south of Streatley Bridge. Riverside route unlikely to reopen until late 2026.

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: Island closed due to diseased and dangerous trees. Thames Path unaffected but island access denied. Tree clearance planned post-September 2026.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge Faringdon closure
Description: Bridge closed March 2024 due to structural and safety concerns. Specialist survey completed. Reopening status pending.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal between River Brent bridge and Brentford Marina. Area being redeveloped. Partial reopening with workaround route via Thames Lock.
